title: Plant a Tree
description: Plant a tree in your community and document the process. Trees help reduce carbon dioxide and provide oxygen.
instructions: Choose an appropriate location for planting
Dig a hole twice the width of the root ball
Take photos of the planting process

title: Waste Segregation
description: Set up a waste segregation system at home. Separate recyclables, organic waste, and non-recyclables.
instructions: Set up separate bins for different waste types
Maintain the system for at least one week

title: Energy Audit
description: Conduct an energy audit of your home. Identify areas where you can save energy and reduce consumption.
instructions: Create an action plan to reduce consumption

title: Community Cleanup
description: Organize or participate in a community cleanup event. Remove litter from public spaces.
instructions: Choose a location that needs cleaning
Invite friends or neighbors to join
Safely collect and dispose of waste

title: Composting Setup
description: Start a composting system at home. Convert organic waste into nutrient-rich compost.
instructions: Choose a composting method (bin, pile, or tumbler)
Add organic waste (fruit peels, vegetable scraps)

title: Water Conservation Challenge
description: Reduce your water consumption by 20% for one week. Track your usage and implement conservation methods.
